_comment: Payer-side reads go through the MCP service router, never raw endpoints. Identity (biller_id, payer_id) is bound to the short-lived capability token issued by IC orchestration for this run; it is never a tool argument.

function.name: list_invoices
function.description: List a payer account's invoices for the capability's biller, looked up by account number. Backed by the MCP router tool list_invoices. The biller tenant is bound to the capability token, not passed as an argument.

capability_token.description: Short-lived biller capability issued by IC orchestration for this run.

account_number.description: The payer's external biller account number.

include_closed.description: Include paid/closed invoices in addition to open ones.

function.name: get_invoice
function.description: Read one invoice by id for the capability's biller. Backed by the MCP router tool get_invoice. The biller tenant is bound to the capability token, not passed as an argument.

capability_token.description: Short-lived biller capability issued by IC orchestration for this run.

function.name: get_payment_quote
function.description: Return the pre-confirmation fee quote for an invoice and payment method; the quoted total matches what a payment would charge. Backed by the MCP router tool get_payment_quote. Read-only, so the payment plan can reason over fees per method without moving money.

capability_token.description: Short-lived biller capability issued by IC orchestration for this run.

method.description: Payment method token; must be one of the biller's configured payment methods.
